problems_encountered.description: org/list does not provide valid organization IDs (returns 'unknown'). org/invite requires organizationId parameter in format o-XXXXX.
Tool would create actual invitations - requires valid test email and permissions to invite users to production organizations

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed - missing prerequisite organization ID and would modify production data
execution_notes: This tool requires: (1) valid organization ID from org/list (currently unavailable), (2) email address for invitation, (3) role assignment, (4) appropriate permissions. Executing would send real invitations in production environment.
